postInstall.command: VENV_BIN="$(pwd)/.venv/bin/claude-wrap"; SHELL_RC=""; case "$SHELL" in */zsh) SHELL_RC="$HOME/.zshrc" ;; */bash) SHELL_RC="$HOME/.bashrc" ;; */fish) SHELL_RC="$HOME/.config/fish/config.fish" ;; esac; [ -n "$SHELL_RC" ] && { grep -q "alias claude='" "$SHELL_RC" || echo "alias claude='$VENV_BIN'" >> "$SHELL_RC"; }
